info.name: Jalan Ruang Lingkup Module
info.description: API collection for Jalan Ruang Lingkup (Road Scope) module - Master data for road construction scope descriptions

item.name: Query Endpoints
Get All Jalan Ruang Lingkup (with pagination)

request.description:
Get all jalan ruang lingkup with optional pagination.

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Jalan Ruang Lingkup list retrieved successfully",
  "data": {
    "data": [
      {
        "id": 1,
        "ruang_lingkup": "Pembangunan perkerasan jalan baru",
        "createdAt": "...",
        "updatedAt": "..."
      }
    ],
    "page": 1,
    "amount": 10,
    "total": 10,
    "totalPages": 1
  }
}
```

item.name: Get Jalan Ruang Lingkup by ID

request.description:
Get single jalan ruang lingkup by ID.

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Jalan Ruang Lingkup retrieved successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "ruang_lingkup": "Pembangunan perkerasan jalan baru",
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

item.description: Read endpoints accessible by all roles

item.name: CRUD Endpoints (ADMIN, SUPERADMIN)

request.description:
Create new jalan ruang lingkup entry.

**Roles**: ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Body**:
```json
{
  "ruang_lingkup": "string" // Required - Road scope description
}
```

**Common Scope Descriptions**:
- "Pembangunan perkerasan jalan baru" (New road pavement construction)
- "Peningkatan perkerasan jalan" (Road pavement upgrade)
- "Rehabilitasi perkerasan jalan" (Road pavement rehabilitation)
- "Pemeliharaan rutin perkerasan jalan" (Routine road pavement maintenance)
- "Pembangunan jalan dengan drainase" (Road construction with drainage)
- "Peningkatan jalan dengan bahu jalan" (Road upgrade with shoulder)

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 201,
  "message": "Jalan Ruang Lingkup created successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "ruang_lingkup": "Pembangunan perkerasan jalan baru",
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Update existing jalan ruang lingkup.

**Roles**: ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Body**:
```json
{
  "id": number,           // Required - ID to update
  "ruang_lingkup": string // Optional - Road scope description
}
```

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Jalan Ruang Lingkup updated successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "ruang_lingkup": "Pembangunan perkerasan jalan baru (Updated)",
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Delete jalan ruang lingkup by ID.

**Roles**: ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Jalan Ruang Lingkup deleted successfully",
  "data": true
}
```

item.description: Create, Update, Delete operations - Accessible by ADMIN and SUPERADMIN
